exclude_decisions.NEXT-026: Dalyance RF + ultrasound device is excluded by user decision in this review batch.

exclude_decisions.NEXT-029: Daejoo Medical Cosmetics ODM is broad ODM/service capability without a concrete independent terminal product line.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-030: Dongbang acupuncture needles are TCM/rehabilitation consumables, not aesthetic microneedling products.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-031: Doum fat transfer cannulas are hard surgical/liposuction instruments outside the current light-aesthetic upstream scope.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-032: Doum infiltration pump is general liposuction surgery hardware outside the current scope.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-033: Doum PAL liposuction system is large surgical hardware outside the current scope.
